notes: Backtest mode prefers long-history local proxies so the vectorized engine can cover 2018-01-01 onward.
Live trading symbols remain unchanged; this file only affects research/backtest resolution and proxy backfill.
Dividend low-vol uses 512890 as the preferred style-nearest proxy, with 510880 as the long-history fallback to restore the 2018 window.

hs300.selection_note: Prefer the long-history domestic HS300 ETF for backtests; fall back to the feeder fund only if the ETF is unavailable locally.

dividend.display_name: 华夏中证红利低波动ETF发起式联接A
dividend.selection_note: Prefer the closer red-dividend-low-vol ETF when available; use 510880 as the long-history fallback to preserve the full 2018 stress window.

nasdaq100.selection_note: Prefer the domestic exchange ETF proxy for A-share account consistency; use QQQ only as a secondary fallback.

gold.selection_note: Prefer the domestic gold ETF for RMB-denominated backtests; use COMEX gold only when the local ETF is unavailable.
